overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an action-adventure game featuring a female protagonist exploring a snowy mountainous wilderness at night. The character traverses wooden platforms overlooking a vast valley, passes a campsite with a burning fire, crosses shallow streams, and ascends stone stairs through dense, misty forests with dramatic moonlight illuminating the snow-capped peaks.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain overlook platform with panoramic valley view

events.description: character begins moving forward from stationary observation position on platform
character drops down from wooden platform to grassy ground level

agents.ego_description: standing on elevated platform surveying the mountain valley, then beginning descent along wooden planks

entered.detail: red-painted wooden observation platform with planks
snow-capped mountain peaks under moonlit sky
dense evergreen forest covering mountain slopes
warm lights from settlement visible in valley below
waterfall visible in far distance on left mountainside
large dead tree trunk beside the platform

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a moonlit mountain overlook with the character standing on a red wooden platform. Snow-capped peaks rise in the distance with a small village's lights twinkling in the valley below. The character surveys the landscape, then begins walking along the platform and drops down to the forest floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: campsite area near waterfall with temporary shelter

events.description: approaching campsite with burning campfire and white canvas tarp shelter
passing the campsite and continuing toward the waterfall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through grassy terrain toward a campsite with a burning fire, passing wooden barrels and tables

entered.detail: large cascading waterfall becoming prominent in view
white canvas tarp shelter erected between trees
active campfire with orange flames and smoke
wooden barrel near the campsite
rustic wooden table with items on it
steep rocky cliff face beside the waterfall
flowing river visible to the right of path

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a grassy area approaching a campsite with a burning fire under a white tarp. A large waterfall becomes visible ahead, cascading down a rocky cliff. The character passes wooden barrels and tables near the fire before continuing toward the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: stream crossing with stone staircase ascent

events.description: entering shallow stream and wading through flowing water
beginning ascent of stone stairs leading upward alongside waterfall

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow stream water then climbing stone stairs beside the waterfall, moving upward through the terrain

entered.detail: shallow stream with clear flowing water
ancient stone staircase built into the mountainside
stone bridge or platform structure above the stairs
large boulders and rocky outcrops surrounding the path

changed.to: left_far as character moves past it

segments.scene_description: The character enters a shallow stream, wading through the water toward a stone staircase. Mist from the nearby waterfall fills the air as the character begins climbing the ancient stone steps built into the mountainside, with large boulders flanking the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with rocky outcrops and wooden walkways

events.description: reaching top of stairs and transitioning to forest trail
path changes from stone to wooden planks over forest floor

agents.ego_description: walking along a forest path surrounded by dense pine trees and large rocks, traversing wooden plank sections

entered.detail: natural stone and dirt path through forest
large moss-covered boulders lining the trail
smaller waterfall visible through trees

segments.scene_description: Having ascended the stairs, the character follows a winding forest trail through dense pine woods. Large rocky outcrops line both sides of the path, which alternates between natural stone and wooden plank walkways. A smaller waterfall is visible through the trees to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky gorge with wooden stairway

events.description: entering narrow rocky gorge with steep walls on both sides
climbing wooden steps through the enclosed gorge

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs through a narrow rocky gorge, with steep rock walls rising on both sides

entered.detail: steep vertical rock walls forming a narrow passage
wooden staircase built through the rocky gorge
natural rock archway visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a narrow, enclosed gorge with steep rock walls rising on both sides. The character ascends wooden steps built into the rocky passage, with limited sky visibility above. A distant rock archway is visible ahead through the misty gorge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a wide, moonlit mountain overlook down into a dense forest and finally into a narrow, enclosed rocky gorge. It begins with the character surveying a distant village from a red wooden platform before dropping down to the forest floor. As the character moves inland, the open vista shifts into a cozy campsite with a burning fire, leading toward the roar of a large waterfall cascading down a rocky cliff. The scene then transitions from the spray of a shallow stream to the ascent of ancient stone stairs, which opens into a winding trail of pine woods and wooden walkways. Finally, the path narrows as the character enters a steep, misty gorge, climbing wooden steps between towering rock walls toward a distant stone archway.
